attacks.name: Mounted Strike
attacks.description: Attack normally, on hit instruct your companions to attack twice undodgeably.

attacks.name: Devastating Slice
attacks.description: Deliver your massive blade unto the Enemy with a wide, arcing slash that strikes ${hitCount} times for up to ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% of your normal damage per hit. On hit, has a ${onHitEffect0chance}% Chance to inflict Terrify (+15% Attack Interval) on the Enemy for 3 turns.

attacks.name: Practiced Lunge
attacks.description: Perform a careful, practiced lunge which ignores Enemy Resistance and cannot miss. Deals ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% normal damage.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Perform an <avoidable> attack that ignores Enemy Resistance and deals <damage>.

attacks.name: Whirling Manoeuvre
attacks.description: Whirl your polearm around, attacking ${hitCount} times for ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% of your normal damage each. While attacking, gain +${preHitEffect0modValue1}% Dodge Chance and reflect Enemy attacks for ${preHitEffect0modValue0}% of their damage.

attacks.name: Bloodlust
attacks.description: You let out a bloodcurdling warcry, becoming filled with a lust for blood. Gain 1 stack (max 10) of Bloodlust which gives you: +${preHitEffect0modValue0}% Lifesteal, +${preHitEffect0modValue1}% Max Hit, +${preHitEffect0modValue2} Flat Damage to Bleeding targets, -${preHitEffect0modValue3}% Attack Interval, and +${preHitEffect0modValue4}% Self Damage on Hit. Each stack of Bloodlust also gives the Enemy +${preHitEffect1modValue0}% Bleed Damage Taken, -${preHitEffect1modValue1}% Max Hit, -${preHitEffect1modValue2}% Resistance, and +${preHitEffect0modValue3}% Attack Interval.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: You become filled with a lust for blood. On use, <preHitEffect>.

attacks.name: Death Approaches
attacks.description: You find the most vulnerable spot to strike your opponent, dealing ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% of their max HP on hit.

tooltipSpans.value: +1 stack on Hit and Evade, -1 stack on Miss and Being Hit (min 1 stack, max 20)

combatEffectTemplates.description: Mixin Template. Defines behaviours for an effect that applies modifiers that increase in strength each time the character evades an attack, up to a maximum value.

Mixin Template. Defines behaviours for an effect that applies modifiers that increase in strength each time the character hits with or evades an attack, up to a maximum value, and decrease in strength each time the character misses with or is hit by an attack.

descriptions.text: ${value}% chance to convert a successful hit from the Target into a miss per 10,000 Enemy Accuracy Rating

weaponMasteries.name: Thrusting Swords
weaponMasteries.flavorText: Light and well-balanced for dancing around enemies

conditionalModifiers.description: When wielding Thrusting Swords, gain a 10% bonus to Dodge Chance, Convert Miss Into Hit, and Attack Interval.
Unlock the Practiced Lunge special attack
If your Shield slot is empty, triple the above bonuses and gain +10% chance to pierce Enemy Resistance.

When wielding Thrusting Swords, gain a 5% bonus to Dodge Chance, Convert Miss Into Hit, and Attack Interval. If you also have nothing equipped in your Shield slot, triple that bonus and gain +10% Chance to ignore Enemy Resistance.
Unlocks the ability to Parry with Thrusting Swords. When an Enemy misses you with an attack, you have a chance to perform a counterattack that deals damage equal to your minimum hit on hit.

combatEffects.customDescription: Unlocks the ability to Disarm. When you hit with an attack, you have a 10% chance to Disarm the Enemy, preventing them from attacking for 1 turn. Chance is increased to 20% if nothing equipped in Shield Slot.
20% Chance on Hit to inflict Intimidation (-15% Accuracy and Max Hit)

conditionalModifiers.description: +10% Max Hit with Greatswords
+5% Max Hit with Greatswords if the Enemy is Intimidated

combatEffects.customDescription: 20% Chance on Hit to inflict Shaken (-15% Evasion and Total Resistance

conditionalModifiers.description: +10% Total Resistance while wielding Greatswords
+5% Total Resistance while wielding Greatswords if the Enemy is Shaken

Adds the Devastating Slice special attack:
(15%) Attack twice for 90% of your normal damage each. On hit, inflict Terrify (+15% Attack Interval) for 3 turns.
While the Enemy is Terrified, they suffer -5% to Accuracy, Max Hit, Evasion, and Total Resistance.

combatEffects.customDescription: 1% Chance on Hit, Being Hit, and Evading to inflict Intimidation, Shaken, or Terrify for 3 turns

conditionalModifiers.description: +5% Max Hit and Total Resistance while wielding Greatswords and the Enemy is Intimidated
+5% Max Hit and Total Resistance while wielding Greatswords and the Enemy is Shaken
+5% Max Hit and Total Resistance while wielding Greatswords and the Enemy is Terrified

combatEffects.customDescription:
While the Enemy is simultaneously afflicted by Intimidation, Shaken, and Terrify, you gain +30% Max Hit and +15% Total Resistance.
At the Start of the Fight, inflict the Enemy with Intimidation, Shaken, and Terrify for 3 turns.

conditionalModifiers.description: +15% Slash Attack Bonus from Equipment
Unlock the Mounted Strike Special Attack
-10% Summoning Attack Interval, +10% Summoning Max Hit, and +10% Min Hit Based on Max Hit
Unlock Advantage

weaponMasteries.name: Daggers
weaponMasteries.flavorText: Famous for its high kill-per-square-inch value

combatEffects.customDescription: Inflict 1 stack of Vulnerability on Hit and  2 stacks on Crit (max 50 stacks, 1 stack lasts 3 turns).

conditionalModifiers.description: Daggers gain +10% Crit Chance.
+25% Bleed and Poison damage. +5% Crit Chance and +50% Crit Multiplier. Double those if Enemy is Bleeding or Poisoned.
Daggers gain the special attack, Death Approaches, which deals 99.99% of Enemy's Max HP on hit.
Daggers gain +150% Crit Multiplier.

combatEffects.customDescription: While the Enemy has at least 1 stack of Vulnerability, its Resistance is halved. Apply 2 extra stacks on Hit if Enemy is Bleeding, 3 on Crit. Repeat if Enemy is Poisoned.

weaponMasteries.name: Axes
weaponMasteries.flavorText: Good for turning one full-width asshole into two half-width assholes

conditionalModifiers.description: +10% Lifesteal and +1% Max Hit for every 10% of Enemy HP missing

combatEffects.customDescription: 10% chance to inflict Bleed on hit

conditionalModifiers.description: +20% Bleed Lifesteal and +50 total damage to Bleed-inflicted

combatEffects.customDescription: 10% chance to inflict a Bleed on Hit

conditionalModifiers.description: Unlock the Bloodlust special attack

combatEffects.customDescription: Inflict Bleed and Bloodlust on First Attack
25% chance to apply Hemorrhage on Hit while Target is Bleeding.
+10% chance to apply Bloodlust on hit
+10% chance to inflict Hemorrhage on hit
While Enemy is Bleeding, chance for both increases to 20%

conditionalModifiers.description: Gain 5% Global Accuracy Rating per 10,000 Global Evasion
Gain 0.5% Dodge Chance per 10,000 Enemy Global Accuracy Rating
Unlock the Whirling Manoeuvre Special Attack
Can equip Special Weapons in the Shield Slot
